scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: क्या आप भी confident English बोलना चाहते हैं? [Do you also want to speak confident English?]
Unknown speaker says: Supernova के साथ अपनी English improve करें। [Improve your English with Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a common pain point (wanting to speak confident English).
- Introduces Supernova as the clear solution.
- Establishes a warm, encouraging tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
want to speak confident english?
improve your english
with supernova
What would you like to learn?
Spoken English
Interview Prep
Office English
Daily Conversations
CONTINUE
Speak the sentence
Way to go! Learning to speak English is quite an accomplishment!
CHECK
Great job!
CONTINUE

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: हमारे daily lessons आपको real-life situations के लिए तैयार करते हैं। [Our daily lessons prepare you for real-life situations.]
Unknown speaker says: जैसे, 'Can you please repeat that?' [Like, 'Can you please repeat that?']
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights practical, real-world application of the app.
- Shows that the learning is relevant to daily life, not just textbook grammar.
- Builds confidence through relatable examples.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
useful phrases for real life
Speak the sentence
Can you please repeat that?
CONTINUE
CHECK
Correct!

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: ताकि आप अपने career goals आसानी से achieve कर सकें। [So that you can easily achieve your career goals.]
Unknown speaker says: यह आसान है, मज़ेदार है, और बहुत effective है। [It's easy, fun, and very effective.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Connects English learning directly to career advancement, a major motivator for the target audience.
- Replaces the 'free' claim with 'easy' to align with Supernova's paid model.
- Reinforces the app's engaging and effective methodology.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
reach your career goals
Complete the sentence
I am confident that my skills will add value to your company.
CONTINUE
Great!
it's easy
it's fun
it's effective

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: आज ही Supernova app download करें और बेझिझक English बोलें! [Download the Supernova app today and speak English without hesitation!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a strong, clear Call to Action.
- Focuses on the emotional payoff: speaking without hesitation.
- Removes aggressive 'world's #1' hype for a more grounded, trusted tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Download
Supernova
Download India's favorite spoken English app.
